evaluated_event.description: Probe C1 result confirmed as reproducible pattern. Probe C2 replicated under equivalent conditions with structural variation.

instability_signature.pattern: Single probe result epistemically unreliable — could reflect noise, shard-specific sensitivity, or measurement artifact rather than genuine motif coupling.

equivalent_conditions_definition.description: Same HC-M006 weight profile, same v2.5 canonical motif base, different target shard, same threshold. Shard must be structurally distinct from hybrid-001. Result must show same directional behavior on target shard with all others FLAT.

non_reversion_test.evidence: C1: hybrid-001 delta -0.1000, 8 others FLAT. C2: legacy-006 delta -0.0456, 8 others FLAT. Dry-run: scores reproduced identically. Three independent executions confirmed same structural pattern across different eras, different motif densities, different target shards.

constraint_preservation_check.evidence: Weight profile unchanged. Threshold 0.15 maintained. No shards excluded. DRY_RUN flag computation-only. No constraint weakened.

final_verdict.notes: Reference case for M-I-7 compliance. Instability observed, conditions reproduced with structural variation, behavior held, constraints preserved. True corrective resolution.
